title: Value/Representation
text: Value/Representation This property defines ValRep list for the static server page widget. This widget supports the ValRep property. For convenience, you can edit the ValRep property of the field in the Widget Properties dialog, even though this is a field-level property rather than a widget property. Value —value of the field (database or otherwise) when this item is selected. Representation —label or image used to represent the item in the widget. For the drop-down list, list box, and drag-and-drop widgets, the Representation can also specify an icon. For more information, see ValRep . Applies to List (USP) Menu (USP) RadioButton (USP) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
